name: FileScopeMCP
description: MCP server for file hierarchy and dependency tracking

scripts.build: esbuild src/config-utils.ts src/coordinator.ts src/community-detection.ts src/confidence.ts src/cycle-detection.ts src/file-utils.ts src/file-watcher.ts src/global-state.ts src/language-config.ts src/logger.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/storage-utils.ts src/types.ts src/db/schema.ts src/db/db.ts src/db/repository.ts src/migrate/json-to-sqlite.ts src/cascade/cascade-engine.ts src/change-detector/types.ts src/change-detector/ast-parser.ts src/change-detector/semantic-diff.ts src/change-detector/change-detector.ts src/change-detector/llm-diff-fallback.ts src/change-detector/git-diff.ts src/llm/prompts.ts src/llm/types.ts src/broker/types.ts src/broker/config.ts src/broker/queue.ts src/broker/worker.ts src/broker/server.ts src/broker/stats.ts src/broker/client.ts src/broker/main.ts --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=dist --platform=node
scripts.build:nexus-api: esbuild src/nexus/main.ts src/nexus/server.ts src/nexus/repo-store.ts src/nexus/discover.ts src/nexus/log-tailer.ts --format=esm --target=es2020 --outdir=dist/nexus --platform=node
scripts.postbuild:nexus-api: grep -q '#!/usr/bin/env node' dist/nexus/main.js || (printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/nexus/main.js > /tmp/nexus-main.js && mv /tmp/nexus-main.js dist/nexus/main.js); chmod +x dist/nexus/main.js
scripts.build:nexus: npm run build && npm run build:nexus-api && npm run build:nexus-ui
